tdd.rationale: Artifact-only governance remediation; zero runtime code. The deliverable is a faithful state.json schema backfill (one spec) plus a tracked classification of the remainder.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red: post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh specs/018-financial-markets-connector fails ('G088 requires top-level certifiedAt'). Green: same guard PASSES after the historical certifiedAt is surfaced to top-level. analysis.py reproduces the CLEAN-BACKFILL/NEEDS-RECERT/NO-SOURCE classification deterministically.

scenarios.title: Clean historical backfill clears G088 with no review claim
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: bash .github/bubbles/scripts/post-cert-spec-edit-guard.sh specs/018-financial-markets-connector exits 0 (PASS) after the top-level certifiedAt is surfaced from the historical lastUpdatedAt source.

scenarios.title: Review-gated recert is tracked, not fabricated
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Zero certifiedAt writes for NEEDS-RECERT/NO-SOURCE specs in this packet; git diff --name-only shows only spec 018 + the OPS-002 folder changed.

scenarios.title: Classification inventory is reproducible
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: python3 specs/_ops/OPS-002-g088-certifiedat-backfill/analysis.py deterministically prints CLEAN-BACKFILL / NEEDS-RECERT / NO-SOURCE counts matching the committed inventory.
